title: Sculptures
description: Sculptures allows you to use a Book to created and edit Display entities in Survival
body:
To initialize the datapack you must first run the install function: sculptures:install
This will allow you to use the book and setup everything required

For admin control there are a few config settings for sculptures. These are all listed as Scoreboards!

scoreboard players set #MaxScale sculptures.Config 10


scoreboard players set #MinScale sculptures.Config 0


scoreboard players set #UseUpItem sculptures.Config 1


scoreboard players set #MaxPivot sculptures.Config 10

#MaxScale sculptures.Config is used to determine the maximum scale you can increase a display. At default this is 10, which means that it can be up to x10 its normal size.

#MinScale sculptures.Config is used to determine the minimum scale you can decrease a display. At default this is 0, which means almost non-existent.

#UseUpItem sculptures.Config is used to determine if the item gets taken out of the players offhand when used to create a display. At default this is 1, which means that items will get removed from the players offhand, if this is set to 0 then the item will remain in the players offhand. If this is 0 players will also be able to copy and paste entire groups of display entities around the world. Making it easy to replicate displays in multiple locations.

#MaxPivot sculptures.Config is used to manipulate the rotational pivot point of the display entity.
